response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, particularly in Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. However, he falls significantly short of the core minimum qualifications for this role, most notably lacking the strictly required 8 years of C++ programming experience and deep, specialized expertise in low-level cloud compute platforms and hardware architecture.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and launching software products across various technology stacks.
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring capabilities, including organizing coding dojos, teaching workshops, and holding Staff-level titles.
Proven ability to build high-throughput distributed systems, such as handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Critically lacks the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, showing only about 7 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2015.
Technical background is predominantly full-stack, web, and application-focused rather than deep cloud compute infrastructure or hardware architecture.
Limited explicitly stated experience in a technical leadership role specifically mentoring cloud, infrastructure, or DevOps engineers.
